intended_use: DiA's LVivo platform is intended for non-invasive processing of ultrasound images to detect, measure, and calculate relevant medical parameters of structures and function of patients with suspected di
intended_use_full: DiA's LVivo platform is intended for non-invasive processing of ultrasound images to detect, measure, and calculate relevant medical parameters of structures and function of patients with suspected disease.
target_condition: suspected cardiac disease and urologic conditions requiring volume assessment
ground_truth: For RV evaluation: manual measurements by 2 sonographers using 2D manual tracing, M-Mode, and VVI (Velocity Vector Imaging) by cardiologist. For bladder: manual tracing by expert sonographer.
other_metrics: FAC correlation r=0.79 (p<0.0001), EDA correlation r=0.92 (p<0.0001), ESA correlation r=0.93 (p<0.0001), TAPSE correlation r=0.62, Free Wall Strain correlation r=0.6 (r=0.78 excluding outliers), inter-observer reliability for FAC r=0.77, intra-observer reliability for FAC r=0.95 and r=0.94, Kappa for bladder volume threshold agreement 0.84
